member.name: T:Ragnar.Branding.ApplicationBanner
member.summary: Setups up and displays Branding for Ragnar application.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Branding.ApplicationBanner.#ctor(Ragnar.Core.ConsoleWriter.IOutputWriter,Ragnar.Branding.IAssemblyInfo)
member.summary: Setups up and displays Branding for Ragnar application.

member.name: F:Ragnar.Branding.ApplicationBanner.versionNumber
member.summary: Gets current assembly version.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Branding.ApplicationBanner.RenderBranding
member.summary: RenderBranding branding banner onto the console UI.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Branding.AssemblyExtensions
member.summary: Gets the informational version of an assembly.

member.name: P:Ragnar.Branding.AssemblyExtensions.<G>$2502F5AC365BF16280B15DAE6E8CECAF.InformationalVersion
member.summary: Gets the informational version of an assembly.
member.returns: The informational version as a string, or null if not found.
member.example: var asm = new MyAssembly(); string? infoVersion = AssemblyExtensions.InformationalVersion(asm);

member.name: T:Ragnar.Branding.AssemblyInfo
member.summary: Provides assembly information.

member.name: P:Ragnar.Branding.AssemblyInfo.Assembly
member.summary: Gets the current assembly.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Branding.IApplicationBanner
member.summary: Displays branding information.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Branding.IApplicationBanner.RenderBranding
member.summary: Displays branding banner to console.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Branding.IAssemblyInfo
member.summary: Provides assembly information.

member.name: P:Ragnar.Branding.IAssemblyInfo.Assembly
member.summary: Gets the current assembly.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Extensions.FileSystemEntryExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for .

member.name: M:Ragnar.Extensions.FileSystemEntryExtensions.HasAllowedExtension(System.IO.Enumeration.FileSystemEntry,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String})
member.summary: Determines whether the file has one of the allowed extensions (case-insensitive).
member.param: The collection of allowed file extensions.
member.returns: true if the extension is allowed; otherwise, false.
member.example: var entry = new FileSystemEntry(new FileInfo("document.pdf")); bool isAllowed = entry.HasAllowedExtension([".pdf", ".docx"]);

member.name: T:Ragnar.Extensions.PathExtensions
member.summary: extensions to handle if file path should be used or not.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Extensions.PathExtensions.IsExcluded(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char}@,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String}@)
member.summary: Checks if a filename is in the exclusion list (case-insensitive).

member.name: T:Ragnar.Extensions.SavePathExtension
member.summary: Extenion methods for saving file.

member.name: P:Ragnar.Extensions.SavePathExtension.ResponseDirectoryName
member.summary: Gets base name for response output directory.
member.remarks: Used by GetResponseDirectory to construct paths.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Extensions.SavePathExtension.GetResponseDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Gets full path to response directory.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Extensions.SavePathExtension.GetResponseDirectory(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Aggregates path segments into response directory path.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Extensions.SavePathExtension.ShowPrompt(System.String)
member.summary: Wraps a prompt string in markdown fence markers for display.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Extensions.StopwatchExtensions
member.summary: Format stopwatch time.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Extensions.StopwatchExtensions.ElapsedTimeString(System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch)
member.summary: Formats elapsed time as mm:ss.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Factory.DefaultQuestionFactory
member.summary: Default implementation of IQuestionFactory.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.DefaultQuestionFactory.CreateActive(System.String,System.String,Ragnar.Plugins.QuestionCategory)
member.summary: Creates an active question.
member.example: var q = factory.CreateActive("Is this correct?", "correct", QuestionCategory.Refactor);

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.DefaultQuestionFactory.CreateInactive(System.String,System.String,Ragnar.Plugins.QuestionCategory)
member.summary: Creates an inactive question.
member.remarks: Allow to turn a question off if not needed for current execution.
member.returns: Newly created INACTIVE question that will not be asked.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider
member.summary: Creates Ollama API clients based on type (Ollama or Embedding).

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Ragnar.Core.Options.OllamaOptions},Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Ragnar.Core.Options.EmbeddingOptions})
member.summary: Creates Ollama API clients based on type (Ollama or Embedding).

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider.FindClient(Ragnar.Core.Model.OllamaType)
member.summary: Finds and returns an appropriate Ollama API client based on the specified type.
member.param: The type of client to create (Ollama or Embedding).
member.exception: Thrown when an unsupported OllamaType is provided.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider.BuildOllamaClient
member.summary: Builds an Ollama LLM API client using configured options.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider.GetClient(Ragnar.Core.Model.OllamaType)
member.summary: Creates and configures an HttpClient for the specified Ollama type.
member.param: The Ollama type to configure (Ollama or Embedding).

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider.GetBuildEmbeddingClient
member.summary: Gets builds an Embedding API client using configured options.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider.ValidateHost(System.String)
member.summary: Validates and returns the host string; throws if null/empty or invalid URI.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Factory.OllamaClientProvider.ValidatePort(System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates that the port is within the valid TCP range (1-65535).
member.exception: Thrown if port is out of range.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Interfaces.IOllamaResponse
member.summary: Call Ollama to generate a response to asked question.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Interfaces.IOllamaResponse.GenerateResponse(OllamaSharp.Models.GenerateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Streams and collects full LLM response into a string.

member.name: T:Ragnar.KnowledgeBaseInitialization
member.summary: Initializes the knowledge base.
member.return: A task representing the initialization operation.

member.summary: Initializes the knowledge base.
member.return: A task representing the initialization operation.

member.name: M:Ragnar.KnowledgeBaseInitialization.PopulateAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Populates the knowledge base asynchronously.
member.returns: A task representing the population operation.

member.name: M:Ragnar.KnowledgeBaseInitialization.AskQuestionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asks questions asynchronously.

member.summary: List of qdrantClient point embeddings.

member.summary: Save file object.

member.summary: Asked question.

member.name: P:Ragnar.Models.SaveDetails.Response
member.summary: Question response.

member.name: P:Ragnar.Models.SaveDetails.Duration
member.summary: question duration.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Ollama.OllamaResponse
member.summary: Configures and caches OllamaOptions clients per model.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Ollama.OllamaResponse.#ctor(Ragnar.Core.Interface.IOllamaClientProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Template Ollama api call.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Ollama.OllamaResponse.GenerateResponse(OllamaSharp.Models.GenerateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Streams and collects full LLM response into a string.

member.name: T:Ragnar.OutputResponse.SummaryService
member.summary: Summary each response into a single file.
Summary each response into a single file.

member.name: M:Ragnar.OutputResponse.SummaryService.SummarizeAllResponsesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Summarizes all .md responses in the Response/ directory into one markdown summary.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Output.IResponseWriter
member.summary: Writes out response from question to either disk or in future other location.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Output.IResponseWriter.WriteResponseAsync(Ragnar.Models.SaveDetails,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates and writes a markdown file from save details; returns the full file path.
member.param: Contains question metadata and content to write.
member.returns: The absolute path to the created markdown file.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Output.ResponseWriter
member.summary: Writes response content to a markdown file.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Output.ResponseWriter.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Ragnar.Core.Options.ApplicationConfiguration})
member.summary: Writes response content to a markdown file.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Output.ResponseWriter.WriteResponseAsync(Ragnar.Models.SaveDetails,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates and writes a markdown file from save details; returns the full file path.
member.param: Contains question metadata and content to write.
member.returns: The absolute path to the created markdown file.
member.example: var writer = new ResponseWriter(configWrapper); string path = await writer.WriteResponseAsync(details, CancellationToken.None);

member.name: M:Ragnar.Output.ResponseWriter.BuildDirectory(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds and ensures the target directory path exists; returns the full directory path.
member.returns: The absolute path to the category subdirectory.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Output.ResponseWriter.FormatFile(Ragnar.Models.SaveDetails)
member.summary: Formats a response into markdown with question metadata.
member.param: Response details including question and response text.

member.name: T:Ragnar.PluginExtension
member.summary: Extension methods for plugin-related operations.

member.name: M:Ragnar.PluginExtension.<G>$60EAAE7EE17C0058D97A35F1559AEBE8.LoadPluginQuestionsAsync(System.String,Ragnar.Plugins.IQuestionProvider,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads questions from a plugin configuration file.
member.example: List<QuestionConfiguration> configs = await LoadPluginQuestionsAsync("General.csv", provider, ct);

member.name: T:Ragnar.RagPipelineHostBuilder
member.summary: Centralized application builder with services, config, and logging.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineHostBuilder.CreateDefaultBuilder(System.String[])
member.summary: Creates a pre-configured host builder with services, config, and logging.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineHostBuilder.RegisterEmbeddingGenerator(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HostBuilderContext)
member.summary: Registers embedding generator.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineHostBuilder.AddHttpClients(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers HTTP clients with resilience.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineHostBuilder.RegisterQuestionPlugins(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Register plugins to load custom questions.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineHostBuilder.RegisterOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.HostBuilderContext)
member.summary: Registers configuration binding and validation for all ollamaOption.

member.name: T:Ragnar.RagPipelineRunner
member.summary: Hosted service responsible for running the RAG pipeline.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineRunner.#ctor(Ragnar.Core.ConsoleWriter.IOutputWriter,Ragnar.Core.Interface.IEmbeddingPipeline,Ragnar.Core.Interface.IKnowledgeBaseInitialize,Ragnar.Branding.IApplicationBanner,RAGNAR.OutputResponse.ISummaryService)
member.summary: Hosted service responsible for running the RAG pipeline.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineRunner.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the RAG pipeline: collection check, embedding, and query processing.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipelineRunner.StopAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stops the hosted service (no-op).

member.name: T:Ragnar.RagPipeline.RagOrchestrator
member.summary: Executes RAG pipeline: embeds question → retrieve → generate answer.
Executes RAG pipeline: embeds question → retrieve → generate answer.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipeline.RagOrchestrator.RunAsync(Ragnar.Core.Model.Question,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs full RAG pipeline for a question using context.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipeline.RagOrchestrator.SaveResponseAsync(Ragnar.Models.SaveDetails,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves generation response to disk and prints path.

member.name: M:Ragnar.RagPipeline.RagOrchestrator.GenerateAsync(OllamaSharp.Models.GenerateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invokes OllamaOptions generation with config.

member.summary: Provides system prompts for .NET 10 / C# 14 code generation.

member.summary: Gets the content of the prompt.

member.name: P:Ragnar.Services.SystemPromptProvider.Template
member.summary: Gets the system prompt for .NET 10 / C# 14 code generation.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Utils.FileValidator
member.summary: Implements file validation logic based on extension, name, and d filters.

member.summary: Checks if file passes all filtering rules.
member.returns: true if file matches criteria; otherwise false.

member.summary: Gets green blinking style.

member.summary: Gets bold blue style.

member.name: T:Ragnar.Utils.Utils
member.summary: Common Util classes.

member.name: M:Ragnar.Utils.Utils.ExpandDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Expands environment vars and validates existence of directory path.
member.param: Config-based folder path (may contain env vars).

member.name: M:RAGNAR.Interfaces.QuestionEmbedding.GetContext(System.String,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Single},System.Threading.CancellationToken,Qdrant.Client.Grpc.Filter)
member.summary: Retrieves top-k context from qdrantClient using embedding query vector.
member.example: string ctx = await GetContext("docs", qVec, ct);

member.name: M:RAGNAR.Interfaces.QuestionEmbedding.GenerateEmbeddingAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates embedding vector for given text using configured model.

member.name: M:RAGNAR.Interfaces.QuestionEmbedding.StreamContextAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Qdrant.Client.Grpc.ScoredPoint})
member.summary: Aggregates qdrantClient search payloads into a context string.
member.returns: Concatenated code context with [CONTEXT CODE] tags.

member.name: T:RAGNAR.OutputResponse.ISummaryService
member.summary: Provides a service to summarize all responses.

member.name: M:RAGNAR.OutputResponse.ISummaryService.SummarizeAllResponsesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously summarizes all responses.
member.returns: A task containing the summarized responses.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
